---
title: "Meet the Resource Speakers"
---

::: {layout-nrow="2"}
[![Sonia B. Sia, MD, FPAFP, FPSP, MPM](speakers/img/sonia_sia.png){width="430"}](speakers/sonia.qmd)

[![Pamela T. Tan, MD, DPPS, DPIDSP](speakers/img/pam_tan.png){width="430"}](speakers/pamela.qmd)

[![June M. Gayeta](speakers/img/june_gayeta.png){width="430"}](speakers/june.qmd)

[![Ferissa B. Ablola-Reparejo, RMicro, MSPH, PhD (Cand.)](speakers/img/faye_reparejo.png){width="430"}](speakers/faye.qmd)

[![Marietta L. Lagrada, RMT](speakers/img/mayet_lagrada.png){width="430"}](speakers/mayet.qmd)

[![Polle Krystle V. Macaranas, RMT, DMM, DIH](speakers/img/polle_macaranas.png){width="430"}](speakers/polle.qmd)
:::
